Powerful Modules

1 Platform. 127+ HR Processes.

Hrxora is built to handle everything from attendance capture to complex production-linked payroll. One system, one source of truth.

Employee Management

Complete lifecycle management from onboarding to resignation. Personal/professional records, document vault, and searchable directory.

Auto Employee ID
Document Upload (PAN/Aadhaar)
Searchable Directory
CSV/Excel Export

Role & Access

Define granular permissions for Admin, HR, Manager, and Employees. Secure JWT/OAuth authentication with audit trails.

RBAC Controls
Module Permissions
JWT Authentication
Activity Logs

Attendance & Time

Hybrid tracking with Biometric sync and Mobile ESS punch. Real-time sync for office and field staff.

Biometric Auto-Sync
Mobile Punch (ESS)
Unified Logs
Import/Export

Shift & Overtime

Manage complex shifts and 8-hour workday rules. Automated overtime category split for payroll processing.

Shift Configuration
Auto OT Calculation
Late/Early Tracking
Mid-day Status

Timesheet Management

Detailed work activity logging for accurate billing. Project-wise tracking with multi-level manager approvals.

Daily/Weekly Logs
Project Tracking
Approval Workflow
Sign-off Reports

Leave Management

Configure leave types, carry-forward rules, and encashment. Automated balances and approval workflows.

Policy Setup
Workflow Notifications
Auto-Balance
Usage Analytics

Payroll Management

Automated calculation engine for Basic, HRA, TDS, PF, ESI, and advances. One-click PDF payslips.

Salary Templates
Statutory Deductions
PDF Payslips
Bank Disbursal Report

Performance

Goal and KPI tracking with self and manager reviews. Link appraisals directly to salary revisions.

Goal/KPI Setting
Rating System
Appraisal History
Promotion Records

Employee Self-Service

Personal dashboard for employees to view attendance, download payslips, and apply for leaves.

Personal Dashboard
Leave Application
HR Chat/Ticket
Profile Updates

Reports & Analytics

Visual dashboards for headcount, attrition, and salary trends. Detailed summaries for compliance.

Analytics Dashboard
Attrition Rate
Salary Cost Trend
Custom Reports

Security & Backup

Enterprise-grade AES/RSA encryption. Daily automated database backups with one-click restore.

AES/RSA Encryption
Daily Backup
One-click Restore
Security Audit

System Admin

System-wide rule configuration, automated notifications, and comprehensive audit logs.

Settings Management
System Alerts
Audit Logs
Global Config
Piece-Rate Tracking

Production-Linked Earnings

Unique piece-rate tracking for manufacturing. Admin sets item rates, employees log production, and earnings flow directly to payroll.

1

Item Master

Admin defines items (e.g. CENTER RULA) and fixed rates.

2

ESS Entry

Employees enter daily quantities with real-time pay preview.

3

Review

Managers verify physical output and approve/reject logs.

4

Auto Payroll

Approved amounts sync automatically as 'Production Earnings'.
